languages.text: {n}Полковник задумчиво кивает, поводя широкими плечами.{/n} "На второй десяток лет Первый Призыв, предки наши, нашли где-то летающую машину. Решили, что нужно дать о себе знать. Один солдат сел в нее да полетел передавать сигнал бедствия. С тех пор никто о нем ничего не слышал. Рубан Хрошовач его звали. Имя есть на стене памяти".

traits.locale_text: {n}Полковник задумчиво кивает, поводя широкими плечами.{/n} "На второй десяток лет Первый Призыв, предки наши, нашли где-то летающую машину. Решили, что нужно дать о себе знать. Один солдат сел в нее да полетел передавать сигнал бедствия. С тех пор никто о нем ничего не слышал. Рубан Хрошавач его звали. Имя есть на стене памяти".

languages.text: {n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник задумчиво кивает, поводя широкими плечами.{/n} "На второй десяток лет Первый Призыв, предки наши, нашли где-то летающую машину. Решили, что нужно дать о себе знать. Один солдат сел в нее да полетел передавать сигнал бедствия. С тех пор никто о нем ничего не слышал. Рубан Хрошовач его звали. Имя есть на стене памяти".

They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

{n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

"Really? I'll be damned... In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a shuttle somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier, Ruban Khoroshkavich, got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. Until today."

{n}The Colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

{n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

{n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

languages.text: 「本当ですか？それは驚きました……第一コールアップの二十年目に、祖先たちはどこかでシャトルを見つけました。存在を知らしめる必要があると判断し、兵士の一人、ルバン・ホロシュカヴィチがそれに乗り込み、救難信号を送るために飛び立ったのです。彼の消息はそれきり絶えました——今日までは」
languages.original_text: "Really? I'll be damned... In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a shuttle somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier, Ruban Khoroshkavich, got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. Until today."

traits.locale_text: 本当ですか？それは驚きました……第一コールアップの二十年目に、祖先たちはどこかでシャトルを見つけました。存在を知らしめる必要があると判断し、兵士の一人、ルバン・ホロシュカヴィチがそれに乗り込み、救難信号を送るために飛び立ったのです。彼の消息はそれきり絶えました——今日までは。

languages.text: {n}Le colonel acquiesce d'un air pensif tout en haussant les épaules.{/n} « Lors de la deuxième décennie de la Première Mobilisation, nos ancêtres ont trouvé une machine volante quelque part et ont alors décidé qu'ils devaient signaler leur présence. Un soldat est monté à bord et a décollé pour transmettre un signal de détresse. On n'a plus jamais entendu parler de lui. Son nom, Ruban Khroshovach, est écrit sur le mur aux disparus. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel acquiesce d'un air pensif tout en haussant les épaules.{/n} « Lors de la deuxième décennie de la Première Mobilisation, nos ancêtres ont trouvé une machine volante quelque part et ont alors décidé qu'ils devaient signaler leur présence. Un soldat est monté à bord et a décollé pour transmettre un signal de détresse. On n'a plus jamais entendu parler de lui. Son nom, Ruban Khroshovach, est écrit sur le mur aux disparus. »

languages.text: {n}Albay, omuz silkerek düşünceli bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu'nun ikinci on yılında atalarımız bir yerlerde bir uçan makine bulmuş. Varlıklarını duyurmaları gerektiğine karar vermişler. Böylece bir asker, mekiğe binmiş ve imdat sinyali iletmek için uçup gitmiş. O günden sonra ondan haber alan olmamıştı. Adı Ruban Khoroshkavich, anıt duvarında yazılı."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay, omuz silkerek düşünceli bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "İlk Sevk Grubu'nun ikinci on yılında atalarımız bir yerlerde bir uçan makine bulmuş. Varlıklarını duyurmaları gerektiğine karar vermişler. Böylece bir asker, mekiğe binmiş ve imdat sinyali iletmek için uçup gitmiş. O günden sonra ondan haber alan olmamıştı. Adı Ruban Khoroshkavich, anıt duvarında yazılı."

languages.text: {n}El coronel asiente con expresión pensativa y se encoge de hombros.{/n} «Durante la segunda década de los primeros llamados, nuestros ancestros encontraron una máquina voladora en alguna parte. Decidieron que debían enviar una señal de su existencia, así que un soldado despegó en ella para transmitir una señal de socorro. Nadie volvió a saber nada de él. Su nombre, Ruban Khoroshkavich, está inscrito en el muro conmemorativo».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel asiente con expresión pensativa y se encoge de hombros.{/n} «Durante la segunda década de los primeros llamados, nuestros ancestros encontraron una máquina voladora en alguna parte. Decidieron que debían enviar una señal de su existencia, así que un soldado despegó en ella para transmitir una señal de socorro. Nadie volvió a saber nada de él. Su nombre, Ruban Khoroshkavich, está inscrito en el muro conmemorativo».

languages.text: {n}上校若有所思地点点头，耸了耸肩。{/n}“初代征召者的第二个十年，我们的祖先在某个地方找到了一架飞行器。他们觉得应该让外界知道我们的存在。于是有个士兵把它开走，试图发送求救信号。之后他便音讯全无。他叫鲁班·霍罗什卡维奇，名字就刻在纪念墙上。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校若有所思地点点头，耸了耸肩。{/n}“初代征召者的第二个十年，我们的祖先在某个地方找到了一架飞行器。他们觉得应该让外界知道我们的存在。于是有个士兵把它开走，试图发送求救信号。之后他便音讯全无。他叫鲁班·霍罗什卡维奇，名字就刻在纪念墙上。”

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel nickt nachdenklich und zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "In der zweiten Dekade der Ersten Einberufung fanden unsere Vorfahren irgendwo eine Flugmaschine. Sie beschlossen, auf sich aufmerksam zu machen. Also stieg ein Soldat in die Maschine und flog davon, um ein Notsignal zu senden. Seitdem hat niemand mehr von ihm gehört. Sein Name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, steht auf der Gedenkwand."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel nods thoughtfully, shrugging his shoulders.{/n} "In the First Call-Up's second decade, our ancestors found a flying machine somewhere. They decided they needed to make their presence known. So one soldier got in it and flew off to transmit a distress signal. No one ever heard from him again. His name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, is written on the memorial wall."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel nickt nachdenklich und zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "In der zweiten Dekade der Ersten Einberufung fanden unsere Vorfahren irgendwo eine Flugmaschine. Sie beschlossen, auf sich aufmerksam zu machen. Also stieg ein Soldat in die Maschine und flog davon, um ein Notsignal zu senden. Seitdem hat niemand mehr von ihm gehört. Sein Name, Ruban Khoroshkavich, steht auf der Gedenkwand."
